import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function UserContact(){const[contact,setContact]=useState(null);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);const[error,setError]=useState('');const fetchContact=async()=>{try{const res=await api.get('/contact');setContact(res.data);}catch(err){setError('Failed to load contact information.');}finally{setLoading(false);}};useEffect(()=>{fetchContact();},[]);if(loading){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"text-center mt-5",children:"Loading contact info..."});}if(error){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"alert alert-danger text-center mt-5",children:error});}if(!contact){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"alert alert-warning text-center mt-5",children:"No contact information available."});}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"container mt-5",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"card shadow-sm border-0",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"card-body",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{className:"card-title mb-4",children:"\uD83D\uDCDE Contact Information"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("ul",{className:"list-group list-group-flush",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("li",{className:"list-group-item",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("strong",{children:"Email:"})," ",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("a",{href:"mailto:".concat(contact.email),children:contact.email})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("li",{className:"list-group-item",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("strong",{children:"Phone:"})," ",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("a",{href:"tel:".concat(contact.phone),children:contact.phone})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("li",{className:"list-group-item",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("strong",{children:"Address:"})," ",contact.address]})]})]})})});}export default UserContact;
